'''√?-?-d''' ('''aed''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fear|fear]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-?-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fear|fear]]
|-
! Citation form
| √?-?-d
|-
! Lemma
| aed
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:?a?adithi|?a?adithi]] || [[word:?a?adiji|?a?adiji]] || [[word:?a?adishi|?a?adishi]] || [[word:?a?adi|?a?adi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?aduthuth|?a?aduthuth]] || [[word:?a?adujuj|?a?adujuj]] || [[word:?a?adushush|?a?adushush]] || [[word:?a?ad|?a?ad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?aduthu|?a?aduthu]] || [[word:?a?aduju|?a?aduju]] || [[word:?a?adushu|?a?adushu]] || [[word:?a?adu|?a?adu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?adufuth|?a?adufuth]] || [[word:?a?adufuj|?a?adufuj]] || [[word:?a?adufush|?a?adufush]] || [[word:?a?aduf|?a?aduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:?a?adethe|?a?adethe]] || [[word:?a?adeje|?a?adeje]] || [[word:?a?adeshe|?a?adeshe]] || [[word:?a?ade|?a?ade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?adothoth|?a?adothoth]] || [[word:?a?adojoj|?a?adojoj]] || [[word:?a?adoshosh|?a?adoshosh]] || [[word:?a?ad|?a?ad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?adotho|?a?adotho]] || [[word:?a?adojo|?a?adojo]] || [[word:?a?adosho|?a?adosho]] || [[word:?a?ado|?a?ado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?adofoth|?a?adofoth]] || [[word:?a?adofoj|?a?adofoj]] || [[word:?a?adofosh|?a?adofosh]] || [[word:?a?adof|?a?adof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:?a?adæthæ|?a?adæthæ]] || [[word:?a?adæjæ|?a?adæjæ]] || [[word:?a?adæshæ|?a?adæshæ]] || [[word:?a?adæ|?a?adæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:?a?adathath|?a?adathath]] || [[word:?a?adajaj|?a?adajaj]] || [[word:?a?adashash|?a?adashash]] || [[word:?a?ad|?a?ad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:?a?adatha|?a?adatha]] || [[word:?a?adaja|?a?adaja]] || [[word:?a?adasha|?a?adasha]] || [[word:?a?ada|?a?ada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:?a?adafath|?a?adafath]] || [[word:?a?adafaj|?a?adafaj]] || [[word:?a?adafash|?a?adafash]] || [[word:?a?adaf|?a?adaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:?a?adasha|?a?adasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:go?a?adasha|go?a?adasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:goki?a?adasha|goki?a?adasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:?a?adnüsha|?a?adnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:go?a?adnknüsha|go?a?adnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:goki?a?adnüsha|goki?a?adnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:?a?adshësha|?a?adshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:go?a?adnkshësha|go?a?adnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goki?a?adshësha|goki?a?adshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:?a?adrosha|?a?adrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:go?a?adnkrosha|go?a?adnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goki?a?adrosha|goki?a?adrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:?a?admusha|?a?admusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:go?a?adnkmusha|go?a?adnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goki?a?admusha|goki?a?admusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:?a?adsherasha|?a?adsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:go?a?adnksherasha|go?a?adnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goki?a?adsherasha|goki?a?adsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:?a?adngasha|?a?adngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:go?a?adnkngasha|go?a?adnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goki?a?adngasha|goki?a?adngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:?a?adyasha|?a?adyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:go?a?adnkyasha|go?a?adnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goki?a?adyasha|goki?a?adyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:?a?adyamasha|?a?adyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:go?a?adnkyamasha|go?a?adnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goki?a?adyamasha|goki?a?adyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:?a?adnüshësha|?a?adnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:go?a?adnknüshësha|go?a?adnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goki?a?adnüshësha|goki?a?adnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:?a?adnürosha|?a?adnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:go?a?adnknürosha|go?a?adnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goki?a?adnürosha|goki?a?adnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:?a?adnümusha|?a?adnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:go?a?adnknümusha|go?a?adnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goki?a?adnümusha|goki?a?adnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:?a?adshënüsha|?a?adshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:go?a?adnkshënüsha|go?a?adnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goki?a?adshënüsha|goki?a?adshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:?a?adshërosha|?a?adshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:go?a?adnkshërosha|go?a?adnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goki?a?adshërosha|goki?a?adshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:?a?adshëmusha|?a?adshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:go?a?adnkshëmusha|go?a?adnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goki?a?adshëmusha|goki?a?adshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:?a?adronüsha|?a?adronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:go?a?adnkronüsha|go?a?adnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goki?a?adronüsha|goki?a?adronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:?a?adroshësha|?a?adroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:go?a?adnkroshësha|go?a?adnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goki?a?adroshësha|goki?a?adroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:?a?adromusha|?a?adromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:go?a?adnkromusha|go?a?adnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goki?a?adromusha|goki?a?adromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:?a?admunüsha|?a?admunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:go?a?adnkmunüsha|go?a?adnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goki?a?admunüsha|goki?a?admunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:?a?admushësha|?a?admushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:go?a?adnkmushësha|go?a?adnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goki?a?admushësha|goki?a?admushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:?a?admurosha|?a?admurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:go?a?adnkmurosha|go?a?adnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goki?a?admurosha|goki?a?admurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:?a?ad|?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:?æ?æd|?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:ho?a?ad|ho?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ho?æ?æd|ho?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoho?a?ad|hoho?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoho?æ?æd|hoho?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nü?a?ad|nü?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nü?æ?æd|nü?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünü?a?ad|nünü?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünü?æ?æd|nünü?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nï?a?ad|nï?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nï?æ?æd|nï?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnï?a?ad|nïnï?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnï?æ?æd|nïnï?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lu?a?ad|lu?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lu?æ?æd|lu?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulu?a?ad|lulu?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulu?æ?æd|lulu?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:li?a?ad|li?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:li?æ?æd|li?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lili?a?ad|lili?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lili?æ?æd|lili?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:ko?a?ad|ko?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ko?æ?æd|ko?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:koko?a?ad|koko?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:koko?æ?æd|koko?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ke?a?ad|ke?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ke?æ?æd|ke?æ?æd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keke?a?ad|keke?a?ad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keke?æ?æd|keke?æ?æd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
